questions.question: What is the name of the fictional Los Angeles skyscraper where NYPD detective John McClane fights terrorists on Christmas Eve in the 1988 film 'Die Hard'?

In John Wick, what specific breed of dog is the puppy named Daisy, whose tragic death sets off John Wick's violent quest for vengeance?

What color is the pill that Morpheus offers Neo to reveal the true reality of the world in 'The Matrix'?

What secret agent code number is assigned to James Bond?

What is the name of the fierce, one-armed rebel warrior captain played by Charlize Theron in 'Mad Max: Fury Road'?

What is the fictional military call sign of Tom Kazansky, Maverick's elite rival pilot played by Val Kilmer in 'Top Gun'?
Which actor won a posthumous Academy Award for his legendary portrayal of the Joker in the 2008 action film 'The Dark Knight'?
In the 2004 action-packed spy sequel 'The Bourne Supremacy', Jason Bourne travels to which capital city of Germany to uncover his past?
In the 1989 action-adventure film 'Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade', Indy races against time to discover which mythical, life-giving chalice?
What is the name of the resistance leader played by Laurence Fishburne who frees Neo from the machine-controlled simulation in 'The Matrix'?

In the 2006 action thriller 'Casino Royale', James Bond enters a high-stakes tournament of what game to bankrupt a terrorist financier?
In the 1993 mountain rescue action thriller 'Cliffhanger', Sylvester Stallone plays a ranger who is forced to locate stolen briefcases filled with what?

What 1937 film was the first full-length animated feature movie produced by Walt Disney?
questions.answer: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
acceptableAnswers: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

In what movie does the opening line read: 'A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away...'?

What movie starts with this monologue: 'Between the time when the oceans drank Atlantis and the rise of the sons of Aryas, there was an age undreamed of. And unto this, Conan, destined to wear the jeweled crown of Aquilonia upon a troubled brow.'?

What movie starts with this monologue by Jim Carey: 'Random Thoughts, for Valentines day, 2004. The day's a holiday invented by greeting card companies, to make people feel like crap. I ditched work today. Took a train out to Montauk. I don't know why.'
questions.answer: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind

questions.question: What movie franchise starts with this monologue:'The world is changed. I feel it in the water. I feel it in the earth. I smell it in the air. Much that once was is lost, for none now live who remember it?'

Which Quentin Tarantino movie has the opening line: 'Do you find me sadistic? You know, I bet I could fry an egg on your head right now, if I wanted to.'?

In what movie does the opening line read: 'I had the craziest dream last night. I was dancing the White Swan.'?

What movie starts with this monologue by Robert de Niro: 'I remember those cheers. They still ring in my ears. After years, they remain in my thoughts. Go to one night, I took off my robe, and what’d I do? I forgot to wear shorts?'

questions.answer: Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas
